title: Foundations of Differential Geometry
pdfs: Foundations of Differential Geometry Volume I.pdf
Foundations of Differential Geometry Volume II.pdf
source_method: pdftotext table-of-contents extraction across two volumes
backmatter: two-volume course; notes and combined index source-mapped only

units.title: Differentiable Manifolds
units.focus: Pseudogroups, differentiable manifolds, tensor algebras, tensor fields, Lie groups, and fibre bundles.
units.label: Chapter 1

units.title: Theory of Connections
units.focus: Principal fibre bundle connections, existence, parallelism, holonomy, curvature forms, reductions, invariant connections, and flatness.
units.label: Chapter 2

units.title: Linear and Affine Connections
units.focus: Vector bundle connections, linear and affine connections, developments, curvature, torsion, geodesics, coordinates, normal coordinates, and holonomy.
units.label: Chapter 3

units.title: Riemannian Connections
units.focus: Riemannian metrics, Levi-Civita connections, normal coordinates, convex neighborhoods, completeness, holonomy, and de Rham decomposition.
units.label: Chapter 4

units.title: Curvature and Space Forms
units.focus: Algebraic curvature, sectional curvature, spaces of constant curvature, flat affine and Riemannian connections.
units.label: Chapter 5

units.title: Transformations
units.focus: Affine transformations, infinitesimal affine transformations, isometries, Ricci tensor, extension of local isomorphisms, and equivalence problems.
units.label: Chapter 6

units.title: Ordinary Linear Differential Equations
units.focus: Linear ODE foundations for connections, parallel transport, and local existence arguments.
units.label: Appendix 1

units.title: Connected Locally Compact Metric Spaces are Separable
units.focus: Separability lemma supporting manifold countability and local compactness arguments.
units.label: Appendix 2

units.title: Partition of Unity
units.focus: Partition of unity construction and its role in globalizing local differential-geometric data.
units.label: Appendix 3

units.title: Arcwise Connected Subgroups of Lie Groups
units.focus: Lie subgroup connectivity lemma used in holonomy and transformation theory.
units.label: Appendix 4

units.title: Irreducible Subgroups of O(n)
units.focus: Irreducible orthogonal representations and holonomy decomposition examples.
units.label: Appendix 5

units.title: Green's Theorem
units.focus: Green theorem scaffold for integration and curvature identities.
units.label: Appendix 6

units.title: Factorization Lemma
units.focus: Local factorization arguments for maps, bundles, and equivalence problems.
units.label: Appendix 7

units.title: Submanifolds
units.focus: Frame bundles, Gauss maps, second fundamental form, Gauss-Codazzi equations, hypersurfaces, rigidity, and totally geodesic submanifolds.
units.label: Chapter 7

units.title: Variations of the Length Integral
units.focus: Jacobi fields, conjugate points, comparison theorem, second variation, Morse index theorem, cut loci, nonpositive curvature, and fixed points.
units.label: Chapter 8

units.title: Complex Manifolds
units.focus: Almost complex manifolds, Hermitian and Kahler metrics, local coordinate formulas, examples, holomorphic curvature, and Hermitian connections.
units.label: Chapter 9

units.title: Homogeneous Spaces
units.focus: Invariant affine connections, reductive homogeneous spaces, invariant metrics, holonomy, de Rham decomposition, and invariant almost complex structures.
units.label: Chapter 10

units.title: Symmetric Spaces
units.focus: Affine and Riemannian symmetric spaces, canonical connections, totally geodesic submanifolds, symmetric Lie algebras, duality, examples, and classification outline.
units.label: Chapter 11

units.title: Characteristic Classes
units.focus: Weil homomorphism, invariant polynomials, Chern classes, Pontrjagin classes, Euler classes, and Chern-Weil formulas.
units.label: Chapter 12

units.title: Integrable Real Analytic Almost Complex Structures
units.focus: Real analytic integrability support for almost complex structures.
units.label: Appendix 8

units.title: Definitions and Facts on Lie Algebras
units.focus: Lie algebra background supporting homogeneous and symmetric space chapters.
units.label: Appendix 9
